name: nomoresoyface
description: A local-first Chrome extension that blurs distracting YouTuber faces and people in thumbnails.

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/offscreen.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/background-firefox.js
